sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91031" key="prwtopo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτο-πόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n91031.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">taking one's first voyage</tr_>, cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρωτόπλοος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
